title: Light and Darkness
overview: Defeated by the Black King, the Volunteer Army and its allies regroup.

title: To Be With Others
overview: Aram becomes friends with Yuri and the gang. They realize that Pirika must be alive, and set out.

title: Symbol of Loyalty
overview: Aram is offered a good sword by Dusty, serving only to further upset Burckhardt. Their strained relationship, compounded by Burckhardt's baggage, causes unforeseen problems.

title: The Expanding Darkness
overview: The gang finds their way to the Sage's Tower in search of leads on Pirika. They are not given a very warm welcome.

title: Snowy Mountain Screams
overview: Aram and Yuri are stranded in Maze Pass. They learn more about each other, and discover some unlikely allies and enemies.

title: The Nadir of Anguish
overview: With Shuza going after the Chain Chronicle, Juliana makes the decision to succeed the throne.

title: Torn Apart
overview: Having lost Yuri to the Black Army, Aram and Phoena press onwards to Spirit Island to find answers as to Pirika's whereabouts—and to how they might save Yuri.

title: Unyielding Will
overview: Phoena and Aram make it to Yggdra, where they meet an administrator. They scan through the Chronicle in search of answers.

title: The Flower in the Desert
overview: Phoena and Aram arrive at the Desert City to seek the help of Musica, who they hope can awaken a dragon with her voice.

title: The Sword That Rends Darkness
overview: Phoena and Aram escort Musica aboard the Ark. They infiltrate the Black King's fortress.

title: Live by the Sword, Die by the Sword
overview: The Black King Suppression Army engages the Black King's army in the final battle. Meanwhile, the Black King captures Phoena.

title: The Light of Haecceitas
overview: With the end of the world imminent, Phoena takes it upon herself to absorb Black Element in order to buy time.
